programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.desc: Motato temps Larry to goof off on their new job at Pa Grape's store/Captain Mike and Mr. Pea compete to get Junior and Tiny Pea the best pet ever

Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper’s ceramic dragon is smashed, the Dews must find all the pieces. But when a piece ends up missing, the Dews work together to create a new piece, hoping no one will notice. / Dylan goes to great lengths to invite his Dew Drop to his soccer game but, in the process, learns that sometimes believing in something is more powerful than seeing something.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: Today is Yarn Ball Day, a special day in the cat-filled town of Meowbuquerque. Unfortunately, the bridge leading to the party is broken. With time ticking, Tag, Scooch, and Kit work together at getting the cats across to the party. / When The Barkapellas announce that they’re cancelling their biggest concert ever, Tag is determined to figure out why in order to get them back on stage. programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

programme.title: One Night Food Trip- International Edition
programme.desc: Stay tuned to this spin-off of “One Night Food Trip” toured by Korean and local celebrities and find out the delicacies you can't miss in different Asian countries!

programme.title: Chansung's Cooking
programme.desc: 2PM’s Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: The cast travels across South Korea, discovering unique culture, nature, magical places, and fascinating people. Each episode features different guests, joining in the joyful journey.

programme.title: Woman in Black 2
programme.desc: 40 years after the first haunting at Eel Marsh House, a group of children evacuated from WWII London arrive, awakening the house's darkest inhabitant.

programme.title: Den of Thieves
programme.desc: An elite unit of LA County Sheriff's Department have to stop a notorious crew of expert thieves from robbing the impenetrable Federal Reserve Bank.

programme.title: Tiger Cage 2
programme.desc: Gangsters pursue a Hong Kong lawman framed for murder and a lawyer they believe is linked to laundered money.

programme.title: Danger! Danger!
programme.desc: It's 1985 and adventurer, Jonathan Danger, has crash landed onto an island in search of a temple that contains his ticket to travel back in time but he must reach it before the Soviets get their hands on the time machine and alter history.

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: A former US Federal Agent must abandon the witness protection program and come out of hiding when his London home is invaded in error due to a wrong address.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China
programme.desc: Set in late 19th century Canton, this martial arts film depicts the stance taken by the legendary martial arts hero Wong Fei-Hung against foreign forces' plundering of China

programme.title: Trespass Against Us
programme.desc: A man looks to find a way to escape the criminal ways of his outlaw family.

programme.title: Skiptrace
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle against a notorious Chinese criminal.

programme.title: Daemuga
programme.desc: The 3 Shaman battle their skills to seize redevelopment district and compete to be the best shaman.

programme.title: Game of Death
programme.desc: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him

programme.title: Safehouse
programme.desc: Carla lives and works in Mexicali, Mexico. After her brother is killed, she's forced to run. In the desert of Imperial Valley, she's now trapped in a deadly game between the CIA, government Informants, and the cartel.

programme.title: Exeter
programme.desc: During a party in an abandoned asylum, teenagers perform an occult ritual that leads to a violent possession

programme.title: In the Line of Duty 4
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop and two American cops are onto a suspected harbor worker and are forced to team up when they discover that the suspect is a witness on the run from the CIA

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: From the engineering wonders of ancient Rome to the bloody medieval battles of Tuscany, and the colossal marble quarries of Carrara, journey across Central Italy and discover it like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: Journey from the fashion capital to Milan, across the great canals of Venice to the otherworldly peaks of the Dolomites and the colorful coast of Cinque Terre to discover Northern Italy like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Ungulate team prepare for a birth, we meet one of the longest living animals and Auckland Zoo helps to save an endangered giant.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Meet the extraordinary miniature animals, who use their small size to survive against all odds in the world’s most deadly environments.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Meet the extraordinary miniature animals, who use their small size to survive against all odds in the world’s most deadly environments.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The poaching crisis intensifies and poachers turn their attention to orphanages. After losing her mother, four-week-old Jamila finally finds sanctuary at The Rhino Orphanage.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Spring comes to the Dales and North York Moors National Parks, the season when the parks' animals must find food, a mate and raise a family.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Unseasonably cold summer weather causes difficulties for several animals in the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, including an injured roe deer and her twins.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: It is the home stretch with just one more country on Manu's list. America offers amazing food experiences on his final leg of his adventure. Around the world. Thirty days. $20,000 to spend. Will Manu achieve his dream?

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s first stop on his food trail of South Africa is the bustling city of Cape Town. Here, he visits a lively farmers market and cooks up a Cape Malay Curry in Bo Kaap.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren continues his food trail along South Africa’s Cape Coast, stopping off at the township of Khayelitsha, home to some inspiring micro-farming initiatives, before arriving at Grootbos Private Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the Cape Winelands, where he tastes a variety of local wines including Pinotage, a signature South African red, and Ratafia, a unique and complex fortified wine.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Tswalu Nature Reserve, in the heart of the Kalahari Desert. Warren then meets with acclaimed Chef Marnus to cook up some exciting South African delicacies.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Julia Roberts’ Pretty Woman costume designer Marilyn Vance, Michael Collins producer Stephen Woolley, The Hollywood Reporter’s Scott Feinberg, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Hanks’ Captain Phillips producer Dana Brunetti, A League Of Their Own producer Elliot Abbott, friend and actor George Maguire, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Whitney Houston’s The Bodyguard director Mick Jackson, musician Wayne Linsey, The Preacher’s Wife producer Elliot Abbott, plus many more.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Zoo welcomes two crocodiles to the Swamp Forest, the new South East Asia habitat opens and the team prepare for the birth of a baby southern white rhino.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Naledi: A Baby Elephant's Tale
programme.desc: Naledi follows the journey of a baby elephant orphaned in a rescue camp, as the man tasked with her survival races to protect an entire species while fighting to save her life.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the drama of the 'Son of Sam' murders, presented the way the events were covered at the time.

programme.title: Edge of Existence
programme.desc: Edge of Existence examines existential threats to the worlds biosphere and what it means for the future of the planet, and Aotearoa.

programme.title: Edge of Existence
programme.desc: Edge of Existence explores a future where bio-threats present one of the greatest existential risks that humanity has ever faced. From viruses to man-made pandemics and synthetic bio-weapons, technology is accelerating the risks of man-made threats.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: When Zarkon demands a tradeoff, the team has a difference of opinion on what to do; Meanwhile, Haggarobsesses over the past

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Motato temps Larry to goof off on their new job at Pa Grape's store/Captain Mike and Mr. Pea compete to get Junior and Tiny Pea the best pet ever

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Madame Blueberry wins tickets to a concert and everyone wants to go with her/Junior, Laura, Callie, and Gary start a club but can't agree on anything

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy, and Carlita prepare for the annual Meow-Mazing Games, they encounter stiff competition from the Doodads and must work together to bring home the coveted dollhouse trophy.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When both Sam and Gabriel pre-order the new Commander Kale comic but the supplier only sends one copy, TZG secretly ferries the comic book back and forth between readers. / When Fawna teaches a silent yoga class, TZG secretly find and remove a loud chirping cricket from the Community Center.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper’s ceramic dragon is smashed, the Dews must find all the pieces. But when a piece ends up missing, the Dews work together to create a new piece, hoping no one will notice. / Dylan goes to great lengths to invite his Dew Drop to his soccer game but, in the process, learns that sometimes believing in something is more powerful than seeing something.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: One of Tag’s biggest dreams is to be a contestant on her favorite TV game show: The Pawmazing Race, hosted by Kelly Korgi. Which is why she entered her entire family to compete in the family edition! And now that dream is finally coming true! / The Barker Family continue their quest to become the winners of The Pawmazing Race. But the challenges only get tougher from here on out. Tag learns that her family’s quirky traits can help them through any obstacle.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: Today is Yarn Ball Day, a special day in the cat-filled town of Meowbuquerque. Unfortunately, the bridge leading to the party is broken. With time ticking, Tag, Scooch, and Kit work together at getting the cats across to the party. / When The Barkapellas announce that they’re cancelling their biggest concert ever, Tag is determined to figure out why in order to get them back on stage. But with a stadium full of impatient fans, Tag is going to have to work fast.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a pirate treasure map in the shape of the dollhouse (a piece of it has been torn off). This must mean it’s time for a pirate treasure hunt in the dollhouse! Pirate Gabby and Pirate Pandy head out on their journey across the many “lands” of the dollhouse to find the Gabby Cats Treasure!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Revvit and the Reptools are trapped by Scraptors and create a fake T-Truxto scare them away, only to then have Skrap-It attempt to steal it

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: With a mix of nervousness and excitement, the PALs get ready for boarding school while having a big-city adventure!

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: Cleo and Zaid finally find the Uta Tablet, but the people guarding it want Cleo to stay and be their Queen. Which, like, is definitely not the worst offer she's ever gotten.

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: This is a big one. I mean, I feel like you should just watch it. There's a huge betrayal and then Octavian totally invades Mayet and then... I've already said too much.

programme.desc: Thunk invents ventriloquism when he tries (and fails) at stand-up comedy, but he gets jealous when Ahhh! Valley thinks the puppet is the real comedian/Eep is determined for two buffalippos to find love when Grug denies her dating privileges.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep takes up death-guarding at the watering hole, but finds out it's more mundane than she thought. programme.desc: The kids go on a training mission on Dragon Island, where Hiccup runs into an old enemy – Dagur!

programme.title: Dragons: Defenders of Berk

programme.desc: After Mega Fat is fired from Baby Corp;he’s forced on the path of recovery towards being a Good Baby. However;Mega Fat is more interested in getting revenge on Boss Baby than finding the perfect family to adopt him.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby uses the cover of Halloween Night to sneak into Bubeezee’s Headquarters to shut it all down. Tim covers for Boss by distracting Marisol with a night of trick or treating.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: A brainwashed Boss Baby breaks free from overly sanitized Bubbeezee products. He rallies the Playgroup Babies to run the company out of business by breaking every product in town.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Inspired by their favorite TV show, George and Harold — along with Principal Krupp — blast off to outer space, where an angry toilet awaits.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.desc: Jim finds a Changeling when babysiting for Claire & finally has proof for Trollmarket but can't tell Claire; Meanwhile AAARRRGGHH!! moves in with Toby.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is excited to test-drive a Vespa for his birthday but things quickly go awry when he must fight Bular's flying Vulture Troll sent to hunt him down.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim uses a courage-enhancing "Grit Shaka" to accelerate his training, but nearly gets himself killed when he hunts down Bular and Toby must save him.

programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: The King of Tears, Lee Bangwon
programme.desc: The King of Tears, Lee Bangwon dealing with the defeat of Goryeo, the founding of Joseon

programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will "get rid of all your worries and all your concerns."

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybri
programme.desc: Gabriella is driven by vengeance after a hybrid monster slaughters her family. On her quest, she joins a squad of Blood Hunters and together they wage war against ruthless underworld warlords, igniting a brutal showdown.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a traditional pollo al mattone, an Italian roast chicken, by seasoning spatchcock chickens, cooking them in a pan with a brick wrapped in tin foil, and serving them with sautéed greens.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah elevates the classic Jamaican beef patty by giving it a Southern twist and turning it into a delicious pot pie. This hearty and flavourful dish offers a vibrant journey to the Caribbean.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: When pursuing her dreams leads to a fractured relationship with her mother, a young student leaves home, but soon finds herself the hostage of a criminal who forces her to drive him across the country.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex’s success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Marissa and Sean need more space. With a growing toddler and Sean working from home, they are busting at the seams. They want a house with a great view and coastal charm.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a traditional pollo al mattone, an Italian roast chicken, by seasoning spatchcock chickens, cooking them in a pan with a brick wrapped in tin foil, and serving them with sautéed greens.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael makes a smoky, Asian-inspired barbecue sauce to slather over sockeye salmon, cooked with crispy breadcrumbs and green onions and served with white basmati rice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Nine contestants battle it out for immunity as Pâtissier of pain, Adriano Zumbo sets a challenge that puts a new twist on a classic pressure test.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: In this episode, host Michael Yo takes viewers on five mind-blowing dining adventures that push the limits of imagination and exceed all culinary expectations!

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy target a listing in Round Rock, a mini city in the Hill Country. They hit the ground running with money-saving ways to turn a tacky time capsule for taxidermy into a modern desert oasis.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S3)
programme.desc: In this episode Rachael's in party mode and she's firing up popcorn with popcorn chicken. If you like those both super-spicy, you've come to the right place at the right time.

programme.title: A Boyfriend to Die For
programme.desc: Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night in Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that will change the young couple's lives forever.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: At the first stop, Ulaan Chuluut landfill, 'Trash Uncle' Kim Seok-hoon is back in action, diving into cleanup mode. But he finds something shocking that leaves him furious. What happened at the landfill?

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Say ciao with Theresa and the Caputos as the big day finally arrives! Theresa and her family travel to Lake Como for the wedding between Larry Jr and Leah. Spirit can't help but be part of the prep.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James and his team connect with Tyler, an aspiring flipper with a lead on a zombie house. But entrusting such a big job to a partner with little experience makes them question whether he can do it.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: The cooks battle it out in twins challenge. Each team must utilize an appliance in their 90 minute dessert cook, aiming for identical dishes, despite only being able to shout instructions at each other.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece creates a fusion of Southern and Italian flavours with her boudin and crawfish arancini. She combines boudin, the iconic Louisiana sausage, with creamy Italian arborio rice.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Avid ocean-lovers Kimberley and Paul are moving to the East Coast to retire and live out their seafront dream. But their big dreams come with a lot of water toys that they need to accommodate.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael takes traditional beefburgers to the next level by adding homemade pub-cheese topping, sautéed sweet onions, jalapeño peppers and bacon on a pretzel bun, sealed with lettuce.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy get a hot tip about a former rental property on the outskirts of Austin. Within city limits and close to the airport, the ranch-style home definitely has a country feel.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael prepares panzanella, a bread salad with tomatoes, and serves it with spicy mussels.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: An emotional Theresa finds out her father-in-law has passed and then feels his presence in the following days while shopping for Holy Water.

programme.title: The Man in the Guesthouse
programme.desc: When a young couple finds someone to rent out their garage, they're happy to have an additional source of income. But soon they realise that their lodger may not be the dream tenant that they thought.

programme.title: The Toys that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: Thanks to the industry-defining innovations of three men through the creation of games like Super Mario and Pokémon, Nintendo goes from a struggling playing card company to a video game juggernaut.

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S4)
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, Bernard Kroger and another upstart grocer come up with genius innovations that help invent the modern supermarket.

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd (S2)
programme.desc: Imagine a man floating through the sky by dozens of balloons, all attached to a single lawn chair. These are the tales of history's most unbelievable, strange, and completely unexpected spectacles.

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid (S1)
programme.desc: The immortality has captivated us for thousands of years. From the Holy Grail to the Fountain of Youth and the Philosopher's Stone. Can these long sought-after relics grant the power to live forever?

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: Mike meets a kindred spirit at a defunct Wisconsin railroad town and uncovers vintage treasures. Meanwhile, Robbie becomes obsessed with getting a one-of-a-kind DeLorean knockoff back on the road.

programme.desc: Jaime looks back at her Southeast Asian adventures, from best dives to memorable tattoos.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes with Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: An Iranian American psychopath is thrown into city jail in Southern California. Before he gets sent to a higher security prison, he escapes by crawling up the plumbing chase of the five-story prison.

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: Buckle up as we take you on a wild journey into the world of vintage daredevils who risked it all for a rush. From the enigmatic Human Fly to skateboard speed demons, these stunts were unforgettable.

programme.title: 1942: Philippine Resistance: Refusal to Surrender
programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: During World War II, Japan plunders a fortune worth hundreds of billions of dollars from occupied countries, but to this day its whereabouts are unknown.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: Thieves steal half a billion dollars in masterpieces from the Gardner Museum. An exhaustive search has failed to recover the stolen goods. Who orchestrated the biggest art heist in history and why?

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team dives in search of an A3 Skywarrior attack aircraft that was lost in a suspicious disaster off the USS Saratoga aircraft carrier in 1960. The Saratoga lost eight men on this single mission.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14)
programme.desc: It is an all-out Gator War as hunters battle head-to-head in a competition to win 350 new alligator tags at the end of the season. Troy aims to get an early lead.

programme.title: Cloudy Mountain
programme.desc: When a decade-long tunnel project is about to complete, an earthquake strikes and leads to a series of subsidence and landslides. The tunnel and a nearby town are at stake. A retired soldier and his son step up to try and stop the disasters at source. Will the authority decide to blow up the tunnel to save the 160,000 people in town?

programme.title: As the Light Goes Out
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve in Hong Kong, a team of firefighters battle an out-of-control warehouse fire that threatens to plunge the entire city into darkness. The team must put their differences aside and come together for an ultimate battle to stop the fire spreading to a nearby power plant.

programme.title: Na Cha the Great
programme.desc: Adapted from a chapter of the classic Chinese legend “Investiture of the Gods”, this is the story of Na Cha set 3000 years ago. After Na Cha sacrificed his life to save his parents, he is reincarnated with his spirit embodied in a lotus flower and is armed with two magic weapons to save the people from their despotic emperor.

programme.title: Shaolin Prince
programme.desc: As the names of Chang Cheh and Liu Chia-liang became legendary, all-too-often the name of their equally valued collaborator, Tang Chia, is omitted. That may be, because, unlike the previous pair, the veteran kung-fu choreographer only went on to direct three movies of his own. Of course, that makes this trio all the more special, and this first effort perhaps the most special of all. It may be an eye-filling, mind-bending martial arts tale of two royal princes battling for the rightful recovery of the throne, but it's also a party, where Tang invites two cinematographers, three editors, and no less than five other choreographer friends to almost literally shoot the works. The results are kung-fu configurations not only never seen before, but never even imagined!

programme.title: Swordsman and Enchantress
programme.desc: The story happens in a martial arts world where everyone tries to obtain the "Deer Sword". Lian's wife is wounded in an ambush and his rival Xiao saves her. They escape to Xiao’s home and he treats her poisonous wound. This leads Lian to suspect his wife’s faithfulness and results in several blood-splattering duels with Xiao.

programme.title: Shaolin Intruders
programme.desc: On a routine courier mission, the prestigious Chief was murdered by four mysterious monks. When all evidence pointed to Ching Hua, his friend Lei decides to clear his name by barging in the Shaolin Temple thrice. When Lei thought justice was served for the culprits, he soon realizes the table had turned and the monks stroke again. What follows is a series of intense pursuit for the ultimate villain!

programme.title: Man on the Edge
programme.desc: On the eve of the 1997 handover, violence is rampant with triad forces causing chaos in Hong Kong. The triad gang leader assigns his right-hand man Ah Lok to take charge of the drug trafficking business. However, Ah Lok turns out to be an undercover police officer who unveils a shocking political conspiracy during the investigation.

programme.title: Pursuit of Vengeance
programme.desc: Kung Fu legend Ti Lung stars in the action movie as Fu Xue Hong, embarking on a epic journey of revenge for his father.

programme.title: Vengeance
programme.desc: Yu Lou is betrayed by his wife and eventually killed by her lover, Fung, who is the boss of a martial arts school. Yu Lou’s brother, Xiao Lou, knows about his tragic death and is determined to take revenge for him.

programme.title: Just 1 Day
programme.desc: Mosaic, an urban sketcher, is suffering from ALS and wants to create some fond memories as his condition worsens. When Mosaic reunites with his old classmate Angelfish, whom he has a crush on since primary school, he asks her to fulfill his one last wish by becoming his girlfriend for just one day. Will Angelfish say “yes”?

programme.title: Customs Frontline
programme.desc: After boarding an unauthorized cargo ship and finding its entire crew dead, the Hong Kong Customs officers uncover a hidden cache of illegal weapons linked to an international conflict. As Customs officer Zhou Zheng Li and Interpol’s Ying go undercover, they unveil a multinational operation with ties closer to home.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?

programme.title: Wish Comes True
programme.desc: Xiao Fei is a cheerful girl who has been abandoned by her mother. One day, she encounters a gifted young man named Zi Wai, who is battling a rare disease. Determined to help him, she embarks on a journey to find his lost love. Even when they discover that the drug treating Wai is ineffective, they choose to embrace hope and love together.

programme.title: Over my Dead Body
programme.desc: This dark comedy begins with an unidentified corpse appearing at the doorstep of a residential flat. Fearing that the corpse will turn their flats into "haunted flats", which will cause a drastic drop in the property value, the four families living on the same floor attempt to move the corpse away, embroiling themselves in chaos.

programme.title: Ugat
programme.desc: It is World War II and Filipino guerilla leader Gabriel (Mario Escudero) is the Japanese soldiers' most wanted. He is cornered while visiting his family. Years later, nephew Carding (George Estregan) is all grown up and ready to avenge his father and sister's death.

programme.title: Paradise Hell
programme.desc: It started out as a harmless school outing. A group of students accompanied by their professor set out for an isolated island for a weekend of fun and sun.

programme.title: Topo-Topo Barega
programme.desc: Topo Topo Barega, an expression meaning "All for one, One for all." What each earns individually becomes the money of all. The problem of one worries the rest.

programme.title: Nandito Ako
programme.desc: He is a lieutenant in the NBI. She is a manager of a stuff toys company. Sparks have flown when it became the lieutenant's job to bring the manager safely to Manila to become a witness. They argued, they fought and then they fell in love.

programme.title: Nang Iniwan mo Ako
programme.desc: What should a woman do when, one day, the husband whom she built her world around with comes home, unexpectedly, and tells her that he’s leaving her for another?

programme.title: Iligpit Si Bobby Ortega, Markang Bungo 2
programme.desc: More of the real-life exploits of the living legend, Col. Bobby Ortega, the military officer whose unorthodox ways of dealing with the lawless continue to sow fear in the hearts of criminals.

programme.title: Magic Kingdom: ang Alamat ng Damortis (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: The daughter of the Empress Sophia,became the target of her uncle Basilicus’ murderous wrath after he killed the empress and crowned himself emperor.

programme.title: Working Boys
programme.desc: The wacky trio of Tito, Vic & Joey became a quartet with the addition of Bagets star, Herbert Bautista. They played jacks-of-all-trades and masters of none in this take-off from the acclaimed Working Girls.

programme.title: Andres Manambit: Angkan ng Matatapang
programme.desc: The true story of a law enforcer who did everything he could to uphold the law.

programme.title: Pusoy Dos
programme.desc: It is non-stop laughter as Janno Gibbs and Dennis Padilla got together as Billy and Jack, modern-day Robin Hoods who engaged in petty scums to earn money for the upkeep of a day care center for indigent children.

programme.title: Manong Gang
programme.desc: Birds of the same feathers, flock together. But in Brandon and Toni’s case,their first meeting is just the beginning of numerous encounters that almost always lead to first fights.

programme.title: Bukas may Pangarap
programme.desc: A peasant couple set all their worldly possesions so that the husband can take advantage of an overseas job offer. But a tragedy is bound to bring his marriage and family life to ruin.

programme.title: Ang Pumatay nang Dahil Sa'yo
programme.desc: Sergeant Emilio Sanchez is a dedicated military man. He believes that Filipinos should stand on their own and not be taken by the Americans.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. // Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition "Puptacular" in the next town.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Ms. Marjorie brings her bookmobile to Everest and the kids of the mountains, Maynard accidentally sets the van rolling and goes off on a wild ride.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups work to build a big bike shop in time for the Bike Festival... unless Speed Meister beats them to it! // When Motor won't take a bath before their family photo, it's up to Rubble and the pups to find a construction solution.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase. // There's a mysterious squeak in City Hall. Mayor Greatway asks Rubble and Charger to find and fix the squeak before her big speech!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a piñata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Rocky loses his voice and can’t bark out his puppack tools, but Matea the parrot has no problem doing it for him. // The Magical Mer Moon means the Merpups are back, only this time they’re helping the PAW Patrol on a rescue.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Francois & Cap'n Turbot become stranded on a remote island,Ryder and the pups fly in to find and rescue the cousins. // It's a double daring mid air rescue as Mayor Goodway's first flying lesson goes sideways,the Pups make sure everyone lands safely.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space

programme.title: Rubble & Crew

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Digi and Tal's inventions to help a busy Mayor Goodway go haywire. // Mayor Humdinger squeezes himself into the Trekkers' dune buggy race, while his cheating ways put the other racers in jeopardy.

programme.title: Dora

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 5
programme.desc: Feel the endorphin rush as 20 of the World's Dumbest Thrillseekers do their thing. We've got a motorcycle crash, an out of control skydiver, even an angry bison. And one thing ties them all together - outrageous fails. With hair-raising commentary from our cast of comedians, including Michael O'Gorman, Jared Logan and Judy Gold

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 8
programme.desc: Following the shocking events at Jane's house, the Red John list is narrowed down further, and the CBI's priority is the remaining suspects.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 1
programme.desc: Former boxer Brandon Bernier and his wife Lori target the best storage units in America and then to go to any lengths to get their hands on what's stashed inside.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 2
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go to war over a record producer's storage unit and unearth what could be a priceless piece of rock and roll history. Then, Jesse one ups the competition for a locker with a multi-thousand dollar payout. And later, a booby-trapped unit explodes, sending shockwaves through the storage facility.

programme.title: ER S1 6
programme.desc: A pizza-delivery man crashes through the hospital's doors; a deadbeat sister wants to stay with Lewis.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 5
programme.desc: Feel the endorphin rush as 20 of the World's Dumbest Thrillseekers do their thing. We've got a motorcycle crash, an out of control skydiver, even an angry bison. And one thing ties them all together - outrageous fails. With hair-raising commentary from our cast of comedians, including Michael O'Gorman, Jared Logan and Judy Gold

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 13
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q get eaten alive leading a business luncheon, and trip over their own feet selling running shoes. Plus, Murr loses his Mommy and his dignity in a crowded retail store.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 8
programme.desc: Hot items from New Orleans spice up the bidding, but will the cans bring in the green? Or will a voodoo curse make its mark? Plus, a refrigerated unit sends chills down bidders' spines when they discover its intended recipient is incarcerated.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 9
programme.desc: A new team shakes up the competition and tests Mo's reign as 'the furniture king', while Matthew goes hard after a three-wheel adventure. Plus, an avalanche of ping pong balls causes chaos in the yard.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 6
programme.desc: Let the revelry begin as 20 of the most boneheaded partiers throw down. From twerking babes to an overzealous Willie Nelson fan and a drunken keg stand you can't un-see. Plus awesome commentary from our cast of comics, including Brendon Walsh, KevinMcCaffrey and Jaime Andrews

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 9
programme.desc: Two years after the Red John case was put to rest, Jane's newfound peace is interrupted by a surprising job offer that could change everything for him.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 3
programme.desc: Competition boils over when bitter rivals Brandon and Jesse throw down over a storage unit containing an amazing movie monster and a potential hundred thousand dollar payout. Security steps in, but can they separate the boys before the blood hits thefloor?

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 4
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori look to cash in on their first big trip to New Orleans, but the locals are hungering for a fight. Then, the Taylor Brothers wage war to win a locker loaded with hunting and sporting equipment. What no one knows is that hidden beneaththe fishing poles, bear traps and camping gear is the score of a lifetime. And later, fireworks explode when a locker full of liquor and rare Mardi Gras masks spark a do or die bidding war.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 8
programme.desc: Hot items from New Orleans spice up the bidding, but will the cans bring in the green? Or will a voodoo curse make its mark? Plus, a refrigerated unit sends chills down bidders' spines when they discover its intended recipient is incarcerated.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 9
programme.desc: A new team shakes up the competition and tests Mo's reign as 'the furniture king', while Matthew goes hard after a three-wheel adventure. Plus, an avalanche of ping pong balls causes chaos in the yard.

programme.title: ER S1 7
programme.desc: A drunk Chloe shows up in the hospital. Carol and Doug share a kiss. Benton and Langworthy are rivals for the Starzl fellowship.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 4
programme.desc: When Philip's parents visit from North Carolina, they embarrass him with stories of his poor rural background and his pet pig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S5 1
programme.desc: The Jokers lack hospitality as bumbling bellhops, pitch bizarre inventions to a confused focus group, and serve lunch with a side of awkward when they man hot dog stands. Then, the guys reach for the sky to surprise tonight's big loser

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 9
programme.desc: Two years after the Red John case was put to rest, Jane's newfound peace is interrupted by a surprising job offer that could change everything for him.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 3
programme.desc: Competition boils over when bitter rivals Brandon and Jesse throw down over a storage unit containing an amazing movie monster and a potential hundred thousand dollar payout. Security steps in, but can they separate the boys before the blood hits thefloor?

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 4
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori look to cash in on their first big trip to New Orleans, but the locals are hungering for a fight. Then, the Taylor Brothers wage war to win a locker loaded with hunting and sporting equipment. What no one knows is that hidden beneaththe fishing poles, bear traps and camping gear is the score of a lifetime. And later, fireworks explode when a locker full of liquor and rare Mardi Gras masks spark a do or die bidding war.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 12
programme.desc: When the guys finally agree to do something the girls like, it leads to a confrontation between Leonard and Sheldon.

programme.title: Friends S7 15
programme.desc: Joey's character on a daytime drama becomes more prominent--to the chagrin of the show's diva star. Phoebe and Rachel argue over who should return a sexy man's misplaced cell phone to him.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 6
programme.desc: Let the revelry begin as 20 of the most boneheaded partiers throw down. From twerking babes to an overzealous Willie Nelson fan and a drunken keg stand you can't un-see. Plus awesome commentary from our cast of comics, including Brendon Walsh, KevinMcCaffrey and Jaime Andrews

programme.title: ER S1 7
programme.desc: A drunk Chloe shows up in the hospital. Carol and Doug share a kiss. Benton and Langworthy are rivals for the Starzl fellowship.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 12
programme.desc: When the guys finally agree to do something the girls like, it leads to a confrontation between Leonard and Sheldon.

programme.desc: Competition boils over when bitter rivals Brandon and Jesse throw down over a storage unit containing an amazing movie monster and a potential hundred thousand dollar payout. Security steps in, but can they separate the boys before the blood hits thefloor?

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 8

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 9
programme.desc: A new team shakes up the competition and tests Mo's reign as 'the furniture king', while Matthew goes hard after a three-wheel adventure. Plus, an avalanche of ping pong balls causes chaos in the yard.

programme.desc: Gecko has creative fixes for funny feelings! He cheers up a sad Fiona & paints a bus to help an anxious Mech!

programme.desc: JJ learns to be kind! He uses the magic words, learns to share his toys & helps his family around the house!

programme.title: How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: How does JJ like to play? He pretends to be a doctor, plays "Simon Says" & camps with his siblings!

programme.title: How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi wonders how things work! He learns how honey is made, how cranes build & what first cars were like!

programme.title: Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: Let's get curious & creative! The mysterious Curiosity Crew appears & Blippi learns to mix colors with them!

programme.title: From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi meets amazing animals! He helps a sauropod stuck in mud & meets a corgi who is a real-life knight!

programme.title: Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: Let's sing, dance & play on the farm! The friends learn the ABCs, dance & have a splash competition!

programme.title: Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: Let's all help each other on the farm! The friends build a bird feeder, cheer up a sad horse & share veggies!

programme.title: Baby John's Fun Learning Adventure!
programme.desc: Baby John's on a fun learning adventure! He plays dress-up, learns his colors & says "please" & "thank you"!

programme.title: Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John's family are his heroes! He pretends to be a police officer & copies his Dad & big brother!

programme.title: JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: JJ plays his favorite games! He plays freeze dance, makes funny faces & builds with construction vehicles!

programme.desc: It's CeCe Time! She gets a new kitten, dances in her ballerina tutu & hosts a fun tea party for her friends!

programme.title: Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle take on the baddest baddies! They stop robot versions of themselves & an evil Orphle!

programme.title: When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Cute creatures are causing big chaos! A sick Magic Pet covers the city in color & the Baby Morphles run wild!

programme.title: Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn important lessons! Pogo learns to compromise at a party & Newt learns not to give up!

programme.title: My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn big lessons! Bubbles becomes Lulu's hero & Fuse is encouraged to eat his healthy greens!

programme.title: Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: It's a day of competitions & helping friends! The crew races in an obstacle course & rescues a cute kitten!

programme.title: The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: The crew faces the biggest disasters! They escape an avalanche & rescue a friend trapped down a hole!

programme.desc: Gecko is on the ultimate rescue missions! He saves Eric from a storm & stops a rocket-powered truck!

programme.title: Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!
programme.desc: It's an epic rescue with Grandma Gecko! She helps stop a runaway car & changes lots of flat tires!

programme.title: A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's an underwater sing-along! Sing about five little sharks jumping on the bed & an underwater spider!

programme.title: Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an underwater learning adventure! The Sharksons sing the ABCs, learn colors & brush their shark teeth!

programme.title: JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: JJ sings his favorite classics! He dances to "Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes" & plays "Ten in the Bed"!

programme.title: JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: JJ learns the fundamentals! He counts baby chicks with Grandpa, learns shapes & mixes colors with jello!

programme.desc: It's a day of discovery with Twinkle! She makes music with toadstools & plays "Twinkle Says" with her friends!

programme.title: Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Learn gentle lessons with Twinkle! She learns about healthy fruit, animal sounds & sings sleepy songs!

programme.title: Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Learn with KiiYii! They sing about animal sounds, count the five little ducks & learn about road safety!

programme.title: Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Feel good & stay safe with KiiYii! They learn how to brush their teeth & how to be safe while riding a bike!

programme.title: A Big Day of Imagination & Play

programme.title: A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's a playtime sing-along! Mia & Max play a fishing game, have a tea party & pretend to be puppies!

programme.title: Roads Unknown India - Episode 8
programme.desc: Jess explores the ancient towns and iconic landmarks of Rajasthan. The crew continues to Jaipur, uncovering more cultural treasures and reunites with Pulak for the final stretch to Delhi.

programme.title: The World - Episode 77
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 99
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 99
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 99
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 99
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 13
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - Bathers Way
programme.desc: Gina Chick strides down Bathers Way in Newcastle on a stunning coastal walk that reflects how this harbour city, home to shipwrecks and Silverchair, has reinvented itself.

programme.title: Dreaming Big - Episode 1
programme.desc: Brothers and rivals Landen and Kaiden Smales, and Meg Day take on powerful swells at the Australian Indigenous Surfing Titles in Bells Beach, and master the waves in their own backyard.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Autumn: Iconic Foliage Garden & Begonias 101
programme.desc: Costa visits a lush historic garden, Sophie joins volunteers rescuing fruit from waste, Jerry shares his begonia expertise, Millie creates a mini crevice garden, and we meet an ecologist restoring Tasmania's Midlands.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 13
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 16
programme.desc: Chas and John discuss the events of the week after President Trump's Trip to China to meet with Xi Jinping. What does it mean for the global economy, security and relations between the two superpowers?

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 99
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - Matilda Brown
programme.desc: Actor and filmmaker Matilda Brown visits Alice and they make pork sausages, while Alice's job is to convince Matilda that chickpeas aren't all bad.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives - Orangutans
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones ventures into the heart of Borneo's jungle to look for wild orangutan, following a team of dedicated scientists whose work is leading to new insights into one of the world's most intelligent & elusive great apes.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 139
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 78
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 13

programme.title: Dreaming Big - Episode 1

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a young man desperately searches for clues about his trapped situation. The unsettling truth actually lies in a sequence of viral videos and they gradually corrupt his mind…

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. When the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at an abandoned building — only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A group of friends goes on a camping trip inside a supposedly haunted forest despite warning not to do so. As night falls and camps are set, the complicated relationships of lust and love between them are exposed, triggering a series of paranormal events that punishes them. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: An American Dream becomes a tragedy when San Antonio businesswoman Andreen McDonald goes missing. Four years later, her husband, Air Force Major Andre McDonald, is on trial for her murder.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion sparks a manhunt for a stranger terrorising a Tulsa housing complex.

programme.title: Partners in Crime (S1)
programme.desc: Forensic dentist Dr Carl Leung recounts his work with the Hong Kong Police on the 'Hello Kitty Murder' and helping to solve a killing spree.

programme.title: Partners in Crime (S1)
programme.desc: From identifying body parts to murder disguised as suicide, Taiwan's veteran forensic pathologist unravels these vicious lies.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: After a beloved pastor's second wife is killed in a tragic car crash, it raises suspicions over the death of his first wife. Her death never sat easy with distinguished pathologist Dr. Wayne Ross.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: In 1987 Carol Murphy, 28, is found by hikers slain in a wooded area of Lefthand Canyon, CO. Police uncover a turbulent love life and plenty of suspects in this Western enclave.

programme.title: ALS

programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magbigay ng mga mahalagang pangyayari, paksa, at opinyon tungkol sa napakinggan o nabasang teksto, kung paano wastong magbaybay ng mga salita at maglarawan ng tagpuan at tauhan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Learn more about area, volume, temperature, line graphs, and experimental probability.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Analyze visual and multimedia elements and learn how to write paragraphs and articles.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang bahaging ginampanan ng kolonyalismong Espanyol at pandaigdigang koteksto ng reporma sa pag-usbong ng kamalayang pambansa patungo sa pagkabuo ng Pilipinas bilang isang nasyon.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Know how weathering and soil erosion shape the Earth’s surface and affect living things and the environment, weather disturbances and their effects, the phases of the Moon, the beliefs and practices associated with it, and the constellations with the information derived from their location in the sky.

programme.title: Preschool | ECCD
programme.desc: Learn the characterstics of plants and animals, what they need, and how they grow, as well as the physical properties and movement of objects. Know more about different types of weather and changes in the environment, the concepts of size, length, weight, time, and money, and the sense of quantity and numeral relations.

programme.title: Kindergarten
programme.desc: Learn the characterstics of plants and animals, what they need, and how they grow, as well as the physical properties and movement of objects. programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang mga salitang magkakatugma, salitang kilos, pang-ukol, at kung paano magsulat ng mga pangungusap nang may tamang baybay at laki ng mga letra.

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about time and nonstandard units of length, mass, and capacity, as well as pictographs without scales and outcomes of an event.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading & Literacy
programme.desc: Identify what are action and describing words, how to sort and classify words, and how to follow directions.

programme.desc: Alamin ang konsepto ng distansya sa paglalarawan ng sariling kapaligirang ginagalawan tulad ng tahanan at paaralan at ng kahalagahan ng pagpapanatili at pangangalaga nito.

programme.desc: Aralin ang pagpapantig, pagbibigay ng kahulugan sa mga salita, pagbuo ng mga pangungusap, pagbabasa ng teksto, at kung ano ang mga pang-ukol, pang-abay, at salitang kilos.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Understand more about time, standard measures of length, mass and capacity and area through square-tile units, alongside pictographs with and without scales.

programme.title: Grade 2 English

programme.desc: Alamin ang mga gawaing pangkabuhayan at bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan at ang mga kasapi nito, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod tungo sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng mga lalawigan sa kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Find out more about people, animals, plants, landforms and bodies of water, and their importance. Discover the types and effects of weather as they relate to daily activities, health and safety, and the natural objects in the sky affect one’s daily activities.

programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip. // Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds "Patty Whips" to the menu at the Krusty Krab.

programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are determined to find Principal Willingham a date so she'll approve a school dance, but disagree on who her date should be. Separately, they set out on their own match-making missions to prove who is right.

programme.desc: Jasmin, Baby, Violy and Daisy are siblings who lost their parents Elsa and Domeng in a bus accident after their scheduled out-of-town radio drama performance.
